message:
feat(education): Create GeneticCode module

Add interactive educational module covering:
- Codons as 3-letter triplets (64 combinations)
- Amino acid mapping with degeneracy chart
- Interactive codon wheel integration
- Complete codon table reference
- Reading frame demo with frame shifting
- Codon bias comparison (E. coli vs T7 phage)

Part of phage_explorer-8g6j.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
